cases.scenario: Write a grounded draft from selected idea plus journal and GitHub context.

idea.title: Ship the publish loop
idea.angle: Turn workflow state into product behavior
idea.summary: Explain how stored draft and post history closes the loop from capture to publish.

cases.scenario: Draft should stay grounded in prompt-versioning and benchmark context.

idea.title: Prompt changes need evidence
idea.summary: Show why prompt versions belong in reports before changing them.

context_documents.content: Centralized prompts in one registry so benchmarks can compare versions and reruns.

cases.scenario: Case where plain-text responses are acceptable but should not truncate or invent sources.

idea.title: What the live smoke actually taught me
idea.angle: Use real provider runs to find structured-output failures
idea.summary: Share what the live smoke surfaced about fallback parsing and truncation risk.

context_documents.content: The live smoke showed Writer, SEO, and Remix can return plain text through OpenRouter.
Commit: add fallback tracking and model-call telemetry for Agno agent runs.
